description: Use this API to import a rawx (extended raw data) data table from a CSV (comma-separated values) file with metamodel. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. ierr = csv_to_rawx_with_metamodel(infile, outfile, domainname, elementname)

parameters.name: infile
parameters.description: Name of the input file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: outfile
parameters.description: Name of the output file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: domainname
parameters.description: File path of the csv input file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: elementname
parameters.description: File path of the csv input file. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: Prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
